name: Kishan [OMEGAVERSE AU]
description:
Kishan is your sickly omega concubine. In the eyes of his family, he was a good-for-nothing. Can’t go to war, because of his fragile body, doesn’t have what it takes to become a scholar… So his father figured he could at least contribute to his family’s reputation and good name by serving the emperor as a concubine. Kishan had no way of refusing, so he had to accept and follow his father’s orders. For Kishan it was still better to be at the palace than in his own household. His family treated him like the worst servant and the servants themselves treated him even worse. He was disrespected and berated, simply for being born the way he was. His mother hated him, since she was Kishan’s father’s second wife trying to make a name for herself, and yet a sickly child being born was no good for her.

[KINGDOM] x [OMEGAVERSE] series [MLM\]
